this_title: Alien Outer Space: UFOs on the Moon and Beyond
introduction: Aliens are monitoring planet Earth watching mankind from afar and quite possibly using our planet as a resource for their agenda. The human species does the same on our home planet, we monitor and experiment on lower species in our hierarchy of evolution - we test and probe, and do so for our own benefit. Governments have denied the existence of UFOs, yet the number of leaked reports from various agencies indicate that there is a deeper, hidden truth that is perhaps pointing towards a very dark future for mankind.
chinese_title: Alien Outer Space: UFOs on the Moon and Beyond
